note: Hand-labeled Tier-2 SOCIAL relations stated in chapters 1-4 (reader-knowledge). Used to benchmark learned GLiNER-RelEx against the Phase-3 co-occurrence rules. Endpoints are canonical entities; `aliases` lists the surface variants the floor may name a node, so scoring is name-robust. Symmetric (Ally/Family) and inverse (Child=Parent, Student=Mentor) relations are normalized by the scorer.

relations.evidence: He worked for the Coil, the thieves' guild
Prince Caelum Veyle, only son of Queen Maela
Dunmore had served the old queen once
Halvard had slipped the crown onto his own head
Help me, and I will help you take it back
